# Plugables — Gradle Plugins for Android

> Opinionated code-generation Gradle plugins for Android and Kotlin projects,
> published to the Gradle Plugin Portal.

## Plugins

- [typed-events](https://rohittp.com/plugables/typed-events): Generate typed analytics event functions from a YAML schema for Android. Override a single method to connect Firebase, Mixpanel, or any analytics backend.
- [viewmodel-stub](https://rohittp.com/plugables/viewmodel-stub): Generate ViewModel interfaces and no-op stubs from @ViewModelStub-annotated Kotlin classes. Ready for unit tests and Compose previews.

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/rohittp0/plugables)
- [Gradle Plugin Portal](https://plugins.gradle.org/search?term=com.rohittp.plugables)
